_comment: Calibrated symbol dimensions from DXF block analysis + PyMuPDF vector analysis of 73 real LEW SLD samples. All values in mm.
_source: DXF block geometry extracted from slds-dxf/*.dxf (MCCB/RCCB/DP ISOL blocks), cross-validated with PyMuPDF analysis

MCB.description: Miniature Circuit Breaker (<100A) — blade offset from DXF block proportions

MCCB.description: Moulded Case Circuit Breaker (100A-630A) — blade offset from DXF MCCB block

ACB.description: Air Circuit Breaker (>630A) with horizontal crossbar — proportionally scaled blade offset

RCCB.description: Residual Current Circuit Breaker — blade + T-bar from DXF RCCB block

ELCB.description: Earth Leakage Circuit Breaker (same symbol as RCCB)

KWH_METER.description: kWh Energy Meter (circle with kWh text)

EARTH.description: Earth / Ground Symbol (3 decreasing horizontal lines)
